confirmation.detail: inbox envelope env_edeb2408-6f8a-4b9b-ae76-23918ced45a8 read back as received

doctrine: A projection may be an admitted work-selection input when it carries provenance, freshness, ambiguity posture, and fallback path to authoritative sources.
Work-selection gates should derive recommendations from authoritative lifecycle/report/inbox/assignment facts, optionally accelerated by admitted projections.
If projection and authority disagree, authority wins and the projection defect should be reported.
Skipping an active collaborator review blocker should require an explicit recorded reason.

motivating_incident.failure_mode: architect loop followed compact workboard ordering without joining active collaborator blocker signal

requested_machinery: Add role-loop work-selection contract for architect/reviewer agents.
Elevate direct review requests and active collaborator blocked-on-review tasks above ordinary pending review ordering.
Expose recommendation reasons such as active_collaborator_blocked, direct_review_request, ordinary_pending_review, local_followup.
Include source facts and projection provenance in compact output.
Add tests where Bob awaiting_review #76 outranks an older or higher-listed pending review #78.
payload.summary: Role-loop and work-selection machinery should be able to use projections such as OSA activity as admitted read-model signals, without treating them as authority. This prevents failures where an architect mechanically follows generic workboard order while an active collaborator is visibly/blockingly awaiting review on a specific task.
payload.title: Define projection-admitted work selection for role loops
